summary: Navigation menu functionality testing to verify successful access to different sections via top navigation bar and content area links

content.objective: Verify that clicking the ABOUT THE FSB navigation menu item successfully displays the About FSB page.
actions: Click the ABOUT THE FSB navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the About FSB content
The page heading shows 'About the FSB'
A breadcrumb navigation is visible showing the current page location

content.objective: Verify that navigating back from About FSB page returns to the homepage, and clicking the PUBLICATIONS navigation menu item successfully displays the Publications page.
actions: Click the PUBLICATIONS navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the Publications content
A list of publication results is visible on the page

content.objective: Verify that navigating back from Publications page returns to the homepage, and clicking the CONSULTATIONS navigation menu item successfully displays the Consultations page.
actions: Click the CONSULTATIONS navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the Consultations content
Content about the consultation process is visible on the page

content.objective: Verify that navigating back from Consultations page returns to the homepage, and clicking the PRESS navigation menu item successfully displays the Press page.
actions: Click the PRESS navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the Press content
A list of press release results is visible on the page
